gap: EE bachelor/master annual degree awards (by level)
current_status: Verified: UNESCO UIS and World Bank classify only down to the “Engineering, Manufacturing and Construction (EMC)” group — no standalone EE, no bachelor/master split. Approximated with EMC share / absolute counts (see Country Fact Base talent fields).
suggested_source: National higher-education authorities' original yearbooks (MOHE Malaysia, MoET Vietnam, CHED Philippines, MHESI Thailand, BPS/Kemdikbud Indonesia); some require a data request rather than public download.

gap: Thailand & Indonesia precise industrial tariff tiers
suggested_source: MEA/PEA (Thailand) and PLN I-3/I-4 tier (Indonesia) official tariff schedules.

current_status: Presented qualitatively (localization degree) — the scarcest public quantitative field.
suggested_source: SEMI materials-market reports; national industry-association supply-chain white papers.

current_status: Verified: a clean year-over-year comparable series is unavailable because regulators define SAIDI differently; main table uses the 2020 World Bank uniform caliber, with only mixed-caliber single points elsewhere.
suggested_source: Utility-regulator annual reports (ST Malaysia, ERC Philippines, PLN Indonesia, EVN/NSMO Vietnam, ERC Thailand).

current_status: Mostly general-engineering or IT salaries; semiconductor-role pay not cleanly separable.
